name: RMD Excise Tax Reduction via Correction Window

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who missed an RMD but correct it before a notice of deficiency is mailed or the tax is assessed.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces the excise tax on RMD shortfalls from 25% to 10% if the taxpayer corrects the distribution and submits a return within the 'correction window'.
